rewritten_requirements: The system shall provide recommendations of nutrients to users.
The system shall allow users to input their daily diet cycle and provide good recommendations for improvement.
The system shall enable users to input their medical reports and provide nutrients based on their medical state.
The system shall allow users to enter a disease name and provide nutrient benefits for fighting that disease.
The system shall enable users to contact professional nutritionists for further clarification.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The application provides recommendations of nutrients users need.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The application benefits people with rich nutrients to improve their health.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Users can provide their daily diet cycle and get good recommendations to improve it.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Users can provide their daily diet cycle and get good recommendations to improve it.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Users can provide their medical reports to get nutrients according to their medical state.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Users can also provide their medical reports to get nutrients according to their medical state.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The user gets the privilege to enter the disease name and get the nutrient benefit for fighting that disease.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The user also gets the privilege to enter the disease name and get the nutrient benefit for fighting that disease.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Users can ping professional nutritionists for more clarification.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Users can ping professional nutritionists for more clarification.
